markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the customer journey to improve sprint effectiveness and scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** The current two-person EM model (relational vs. editorial) causes context loss and prevents scaling. Aida's editorial bottleneck (16 accounts) is the primary constraint.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift to a single, end-to-end EM model where one person owns the client relationship and deliverables from kickoff through Week 8.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Pilot the new model with Will in January. Aida will coach him on the strategy process but will not engage with the client, enabling her to document and standardize the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [**Goal:** Increase sprint capacity from 2 to 3 clients/week by March, targeting an 85% conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Current EM Model & Bottlenecks

  - [The current two-person EM model creates a disconnect between client discovery and strategy execution.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Relational EM (e.g., Eric):** Manages the client relationship and discovery (kickoff, CMS walkthroughs).](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [**Editorial EM (Aida):** Joins at Week 2 to lead calls and execute deliverables (strategy, content calendar).](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Result:** Aida lacks direct kickoff context, which can lead to misaligned strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Example (Brex):** A key client goal (leads, not traffic) was missed in the kickoff and only discovered in a separate call, nearly derailing the Week 2 strategy presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Aida's editorial workload is the primary bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Scope:** Edits nearly all content for 16 accounts, consuming a full day each week.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures quality and prevents client-facing errors, but is unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Trust:** Aida trusts experienced Content Managers (Sydney, Natalie, Kavishka) to deliver client-ready content without her review.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

### Solution: End-to-End EM Ownership

  - [The team agreed on a new model: a single EM owns the client relationship and deliverables from kickoff through Week 8.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This provides a consistent client experience, prevents context loss, and makes the process scalable.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [**Aida's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
      - [Shift from editorial execution to coaching and standardization.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Reduce account load to 5–7 to enable deeper client engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [**Editorial Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [Aida will delegate editing to trusted Content Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
      - [The team will message the "calibration" phase as a temporary, tactical deep-dive to manage client expectations and prevent scope creep.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Goal: Increase Sprint Capacity

  - [The new model is a prerequisite for scaling the business.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [**Target:** Increase sprint capacity from 2 to 3 clients per week by March.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [**Success Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
      - [Maintain or exceed an 85% client conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [Ensure a high-quality client and employee experience.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
      - [Pilot the new end-to-end EM model with Will on a January account.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
      - [Coach Will on the strategy process, using this as an opportunity to document and standardize the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
      - [Ensure Aida has no direct client contact on the pilot account.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [**Andi & Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
      - [Review the pilot's success after a few cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
      - [Present the revised model to the team for implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/eHah35R3fQvGbyckyPqxsyshKH5VrRnz?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
